title: Refactor: Replace callback pattern with promises
original_text: Refactored the async code to replace callback patterns with promises. This improves code readability and makes error handling more consistent. Updated all async functions in services/api.py to use async/await syntax. Added proper error propagation and try-catch blocks. Updated tests to handle promise rejections. Result: 38 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(api): replace callbacks with async/await promises
expected_body_lines: - Replace callback patterns with async/await syntax
- Improve code readability and error handling
- Add proper error propagation and try-catch blocks
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(api): replace callbacks with async/await promises"
